prompts: Explain how virtual memory works in one paragraph.
Summarize the difference between CPU and GPU architectures in two sentences.
benchmark._ollama_tag_note: The Ollama library tag does not derive from the Hugging Face repo name (e.g. 'phi-3-medium-4k-instruct' is NOT a valid Ollama tag) - it must be looked up and set explicitly. Confirmed via 'ollama pull phi3:medium' during Phase 4.
benchmark._quant_ollama_tags_note: Each quant level maps to a distinct Ollama library tag -- 'phi3:medium' resolves to Q4_0 by default, it is NOT re-quantized per quant_level. Q2_K requires the explicit tag above (confirmed pullable via 'ollama pull phi3:14b-medium-4k-instruct-q2_K' during Phase 4).

roofline._note: Illustrative placeholders for a 4-core ultrabook CPU; replace with measured/vendor values during Phase 4 execution.
